pattern: Filtering the decimal digits of a number and reassembling the survivors is a direct string transform on its base-10 representation.
hints: Think about the number as its sequence of decimal digits rather than as a single value.
Every digit that is not '0' should survive in its original left-to-right position.
Convert n to a string, drop each '0' character, then parse the remaining characters back into an integer.

edge_inputs.description: no zeros present leaves the number unchanged
leading-position digit nonzero but many internal zeros

stress.description: random magnitudes up to the constraint with a healthy mix of zero digits
stress.note: first digit forced nonzero so the value stays in range
